description: Vertically-stacked list where each item gets room to breathe. Handles both string arrays (parses 'Label: description' format) and object arrays (uses config fields). Each item has a colored left border, uppercase label with accent dot, readable prose description, and auto-collapse for long text.

title_field.description: For object arrays: field name for the item label. Omit for string arrays.

description_field.description: For object arrays: field name for the item description. Omit for string arrays.

separator.description: For string arrays: character(s) to split label from description

max_visible_chars.description: Auto-collapse descriptions longer than this many characters

badge_fields.description: Optional extra object fields to show as colored badges next to the label

section_description.description: Optional description shown above the list
